bridge_equation_v26.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v26 = mix(B_plastic_v25, L_steady_plus, 1 - P_steady_plus, D_feature_v20, 1 - G_brain_v20)
bridge_equation_v26.structure_term: B_struct_v26 = mix(B_struct_v25, S_steady_plus, R_steady_plus, 1 - P_steady_plus, D_structure_v20)
bridge_equation_v26.readiness_term: R_train_v26 = mix(R_train_v25, B_plastic_v26, B_struct_v26, R_steady_plus, D_align_v20, 1 - P_steady_plus)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第二十六桥开始吸收更稳的放大强化和脑编码第二十版，检查放大趋势是否继续落成更稳定的规则层。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第二十六桥并回主核，验证更稳放大是否继续走向低风险稳态施工区。
